parameter_description: Controls the tone of the selected Character effect.
Sets the modulation speed/rate.
Sets the delay time or reverb size.
Blends between input signal and effected signal.
Adjusts the intensity of the Character effect.
Adjusts the intensity/depth of the Movement effect.
Adjusts the repeats/feedback/mix of the Diffusion effect.
Adjusts the cutoff or intensity of the Texture effect.
Fine-tunes drive headroom or swell threshold.
Adds random pitch shifts or warble to Movement module effects.
Adds pitch modulation or tape degradation to Diffusion module effects.
Attenuates or boosts the FX output level.
Adjusts the output volume of the Character module.
Adjusts the output volume of the Movement module.
Adjusts only the Diffusion wet effect volume.
Adjusts the output volume of the Texture module.
Selects the active Character effect or bypasses the module.
Selects the active Movement effect or bypasses the module.
usage: 0-21: Doubler; 22-43: Vibrato; 44-65: Phaser; 66-87: Tremolo; 88-109: Pitch; 110-127: Off

parameter_description: Selects the active Diffusion effect or bypasses the module.
usage: 0-21: Cascade; 22-43: Reels; 44-65: Space; 66-87: Collage; 88-109: Reverse; 110-127: Off

parameter_description: Selects the active Texture effect or bypasses the module.
usage: 0-21: Filter; 22-43: Squash; 44-65: Cassette; 66-87: Broken; 88-109: Interference; 110-127: Off

parameter_description: Engages or disengages Chroma Console.
Sets standard or dual bypass mode.
usage: 0-31: Total bypass; 32-63: Dual bypass; 64-127: Total engage

parameter_description: Bypasses or engages the Character module.
Bypasses or engages the Movement module.
Bypasses or engages the Diffusion module.
Bypasses or engages the Texture module.
Controls playback and recording of knob movements.
Stops or erases recorded gestures.
Controls looper/sustainer recording and playback.
Routes Capture looper before or after effects.
Sends tap tempo input.
Selects low-pass filter (LPF), tilt filter, or high-pass filter (HPF) style for Texture module.
Sets the input level calibration headroom.
Enters or exits the calibration menu.
